<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="it">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,maximum-scale=1">
<title>Le mie guide</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
body{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#e8f4fd,#f0fdf4 50%,#fef9ee);min-height:100vh;color:#1e293b;}
.header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#6366f1);color:white;padding:28px 20px 20px;text-align:center;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(59,130,246,.3);}
.header h1{font-size:26px;font-weight:900;}
.header p{font-size:13px;opacity:.8;margin-top:4px;}
.main{padding:20px 16px 80px;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto;}
.back-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:white;border:none;border-radius:12px;padding:10px 16px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:14px;color:#3b82f6;margin-bottom:16px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
.tut-card{background:white;border-radius:20px;padding:20px;margin-bottom:16px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08);cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s;}
.tut-card:active{transform:scale(.98);}
.tut-icon{font-size:36px;margin-bottom:10px;display:block;}
.tut-name{font-size:18px;font-weight:900;margin-bottom:4px;}
.tut-meta{font-size:13px;color:#94a3b8;}
.step-card{background:white;border-radius:20px;margin-bottom:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
.step-head{background:#3b82f6;color:white;padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.step-num{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);font-weight:900;font-size:15px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.step-lbl{font-weight:800;font-size:14px;}
.step-img{width:100%;max-height:340px;object-fit:contain;background:#f8fafc;display:block;}
.step-caption{padding:16px 18px;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.5;}
.done-btn{width:calc(100% - 36px);margin:0 18px 20px;padding:15px;background:#22c55e;border:none;border-radius:14px;color:white;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(34,197,94,.3);}
.empty{text-align:center;padding:60px 20px;color:#94a3b8;}
.empty .big{font-size:48px;display:block;margin-bottom:12px;}
.banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fef3c7,#fde68a);border-radius:16px;padding:16px 18px;margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
.banner-emoji{font-size:32px;flex-shrink:0;}
.banner-text{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#92400e;line-height:1.4;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="header"><h1>🌟 Le mie guide</h1><p>Passo dopo passo, ce la fai!</p></div>
<div class="main" id="main"></div>
<script>
const tutorials = [{"id":"tut_1775209126829","name":"Test","icon":"📱","steps":[{"id":"step_1775209144517","img":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","caption":""}],"published":true}];
let mode = 'list';
let currentId = null;
function render() {
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  if (mode === 'list') {
    document.querySelector('.header h1').textContent = '🌟 Le mie guide';
    if (!tutorials.length) { main.innerHTML = '<div class="empty"><span class="big">📭</span><p>Nessuna guida ancora.</p></div>'; return; }
    main.innerHTML = '<div class="banner"><div class="banner-emoji">💪</div><div class="banner-text">Qui trovi tutto quello che ti serve. Prenditi il tempo che vuoi!</div></div>' +
      tutorials.map(t => '<div class="tut-card" onclick="openTut(''+t.id+'')"><span class="tut-icon">'+t.icon+'</span><div class="tut-name">'+t.name+'</div><div class="tut-meta">'+(t.steps||[]).length+' schermate · Tocca per iniziare →</div></div>').join('');
  } else {
    const t = tutorials.find(x => x.id === currentId);
    document.querySelector('.header h1').textContent = t.icon + ' ' + t.name;
    main.innerHTML = '<button class="back-btn" onclick="goBack()">‹ Torna alle guide</button>' +
      (t.steps||[]).map((s,i) => '<div class="step-card"><div class="step-head"><div class="step-num">'+(i+1)+'</div><div class="step-lbl">Passo '+(i+1)+'</div></div>'+(s.img?'<img class="step-img" src="'+s.img+'" alt="passo '+(i+1)+'">'  :'')+(s.caption?'<div class="step-caption">'+s.caption+'</div>':'')+'</div>').join('') +
      '<button class="done-btn" onclick="goBack()">✅ Ho finito! Torna alle guide</button>';
    window.scrollTo({top:0});
  }
}
function openTut(id) { mode = 'tutorial'; currentId = id; render(); }
function goBack() { mode = 'list'; render(); }
render();
</script>
</body>
</html>
